case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE VS. SOPHANNA KONG

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/21/18.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONG, SOPHANNA $3,905.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,951.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/14/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF CCSF RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 46.00 SERVED SEP-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, SOPHANNA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-06-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE REPRESENTED BY ROSA RAMIREZ. DEFENDANT SOPHANNA KONG DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, SOPHANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
